summary: Completed e2e testing of trial signup, expiry blocking, pricing page features. All critical flows working correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered after multiple login attempts during testing - this is expected/correct behavior

passed_tests: POST /api/onboarding/signup returns org_id, tenant_id, user_id, plan=trial, trial_end
Trial signup triggers automatic demo data seeding (backend validated)
Expired trial user login shows full-page trial expired blocker gate
Trial expired gate has title: 'Deneme süreniz sona erdi'
Trial expired gate has subtitle: 'Tüm verileriniz korunuyor'
Trial expired gate shows 3 plan cards (Starter, Pro, Enterprise)
Plan Seç buttons configured to route to /pricing
Normal admin user login does NOT show trial expired blocker
Normal admin has full sidebar and app access
GET /api/onboarding/trial returns expired=true for expired trial user
GET /api/onboarding/trial returns expired=false for non-trial admin
Pricing page Problem section present with Turkish copy
Pricing page Solution section present with Turkish copy
Pricing page ROI section present with social proof
critical_code_review_comments: TrialExpiredGate correctly uses Link to=/pricing for Plan Seç buttons
AppShell properly checks trialExpired status before rendering gate
Onboarding service correctly seeds demo data for trial signups
Trial status endpoint handles both expired trials and non-trial users correctly
seed_data_creation: Created several test signups for validation (uitest.*.@trial.test accounts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All trial expiry and signup features validated. Trial expired gate correctly blocks expired trial users. Normal admins have full access. Public pricing page includes problem/solution/ROI blocks in Turkish. Demo data auto-seeding for trial signups is configured and working (backend validated counts: customers=20, reservations=30, tours=5, hotels=5, products=5).

feature_validation_summary.expired_trial_blocker_in_app: PASS - Shows 'Deneme süreniz sona erdi' with plan cards
feature_validation_summary.auto_demo_data_trial_signup: PASS - Backend seeds data on trial signup
feature_validation_summary.pricing_problem_solution_roi: PASS - All blocks present with Turkish text
